name: Aurora Innovation
bullCase: Aurora establishes itself as the de facto autonomous trucking platform, scaling to 200+ driverless trucks by late 2026 with OEM partnerships (Volvo, PACCAR). Next-gen hardware cost reductions drive gross-profit-positive status, unlocking the $1T+ autonomous freight TAM.
bearCase: Persistent cash burn forces continuous share dilution, eroding equity value. Commercial scaling stalls if customers resist Driver-as-a-Service pricing, a high-profile safety incident triggers regulatory backlash, or well-funded competitors (Waymo, TuSimple) capture market share first.

screener.note: Missing/negative forward PE and no trailing EPS fallback

description: Aurora Innovation, Inc. engages in the self-driving technology business in the United States.
